### Added
- Add custom branding asset support with logo overrides, allowing UI logo customization via mounted volumes without code changes.
See [./docs/releases/v0.124.0-changelog.md](https://github.com/giantswarm/backstage/blob/main/docs/releases/v0.124.0-changelog.md) for more information.
